title: TAG PROVIDER
body: [default] is the main tag DB. Tags live HERE — not in the PLC. They are Ignition-side references / bindings.
code:
Tag Providers:
  [default]      ← internal, always exists
  [System]       ← gateway system tags (read-only)
  [YourProject]  ← project-scoped (if configured)

Tags in [default]:
  - Memory tags     (internal)
  - OPC tags        (bound to PLC points)
  - Expression tags (calculated)
  - Query tags      (from database)
  - UDT instances   (templated)
key: Tags are NOT PLC variables — they are references
mistakes: Creating tags in the wrong provider
Not separating tag scan classes from PLC scan rates
